creator: wbe@psr.com
text:
Seagate and Western Digital HDDs that report "Command Queueing enabled" see no such errors.

The 2018 forum article I referenced reported similar errors with a Samsung 860 EVO SSD, and that OpenBSD and Haiku saw similar problems with that SSD at that time.  Other than a comment about Intel 6-series controllers, the issue of which AHCI controller was used didn't come up.

I haven't tried another brand of SSD yet.
